title: Candidate shall designate for which division he is a candidate
doc_html:
§584.  Candidate shall designate for which division he is a candidate

A candidate for nomination and election to the judgeship of any such district court, at the time of filing his declaration as a candidate therefor, shall designate only one division of the court for the presiding judgeship of which he is a candidate.
